content: Helios Utilities Corp. is a synthetic, illustrative regulated-utility issuer. It is a subsidiary within a larger utility group, so provider treatment of parent support and sector-specific adjustments differs materially. Both anchor providers rate Helios on the same Q3 fundamentals filed 2025-11-10, yet reach a two-notch gap: the divergence is driven by methodology (parent-support uplift versus a standalone, sector-conservative view), not by input freshness. Helios is the anchor case for methodology-driven divergence.
disclaimer: Synthetic, illustrative issuer — fictional entity, not a real SEC filer.
